code:
import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(text, "\n")
mut i = 0
mut found = -1
mut last_line = ""
let n = list.len(lines)
while i < n
  match list.get(lines, i)
  when Some(line)
    if not string.is_empty(string.trim(line))
      found = i
      last_line = line
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if found < 0
  println("(none)")
else
  println(last_line)
end
